vertical_decoupling.definition: 控制平面 (control plane) ↔ 执行平面 (execution plane) 协议中立解耦
vertical_decoupling.1st_party_evidence: Apple Xcode 26.3 + Claude Agent SDK + getsentry/XcodeBuildMCP
vertical_decoupling.r666_extension: Refinery verification gates + Bors-style bisecting = vertical 解耦在 multi-agent 场景的具体实现

horizontal_decoupling.definition: 多个 control plane (Claude Code + Codex CLI) ↔ 同一个 Skill + execution plane
horizontal_decoupling.protocol_basis: agentskills/agentskills vendor-neutral Skill spec (16+ 客户端支持)
horizontal_decoupling.r666_extension: Git Worktree per-Polecat 隔离 = horizontal 解耦的物理实现

cross_device_coordination.definition: 多端 harness (mobile / desktop / cloud) 通过会话状态协议交接
cross_device_coordination.1st_party_evidence: Cursor iOS Mobile-Cloud Hybrid Harness + SeemSeam/CCB v8.0.15
cross_device_coordination.protocol_basis: append-only telemetry + cache-first architecture + rewind retry (4 primitives)
cross_device_coordination.r666_extension: Beads + Convoys = cross-device 维度的工业级工作单元

planning_primitive_cross_dimension.definition: vendor-neutral plan + completion gate + file-based working state 三合一协议
planning_primitive_cross_dimension.1st_party_evidence: OthmanAdi/planning-with-files 24,602 ⭐ v3.2.0 + Anthropic: Harness Design for Long-Running Apps + Meta REA + Gas Town v1.2.1 Beads/Convoys/Refinery
planning_primitive_cross_dimension.r666_extension: Beads (vendor-neutral plan) + Convoys (completion gate) + Git Worktree (file-based working state) = Planning Primitive 在 multi-agent 场景的工业级扩展

multi_agent_orchestration_primitive_NEW_.definition: Git Worktree (per-Agent 隔离) + Beads ledger (结构化工作单元) + Convoys (跨依赖追踪) + Refinery (Bors-style bisecting merge queue) 四合一协议
multi_agent_orchestration_primitive_NEW_.1st_party_evidence: Gas Town v1.2.1 16,292 ⭐ + Git + Dolt + Bors + Anthropic Claude Code Agent Teams + Microsoft AutoGen + LangGraph
multi_agent_orchestration_primitive_NEW_.protocol_basis: Git + Dolt + TOML Formula + Bors-style bisecting
multi_agent_orchestration_primitive_NEW_.paradigm_analogy: 「multi-agent 操作系统」= 用 Git + Dolt + Convoy 实现类 Unix process group 的隔离与监控
